Error: 

❌  Required deploy-time secrets are missing for the smoke suite.

   Add the following to your deploy secrets before deploying:

     SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://meta-trader-link.replit.app
     DEMO_MT5_LOGIN=<MT5 account number>
     DEMO_MT5_PASSWORD=<MT5 password>
     DEMO_MT5_SERVER=<broker server name>

   Obtain a free MetaAPI demo account at https://app.metaapi.cloud
   and store its credentials as the DEMO_MT5_* secrets above.
